name: Avocado & Mozarella Cheese Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces mozarella cheese; cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tomatoes in half and scoop out the insides. (You can use this to make Tomato-Basil Cream Sauce.)
2. Set each tomato half on top of a plate garnished with lettuce.
3. In a blender, combine 5 garlic cloves; chopped basil; 2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar; 1 tablespoon Dijon mustard; and 4 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil.
4. Blend until smooth and adjust seasoning as desired.
5. Toss the avocado and mozarella cubes in the dressing until fully coated.
6. Stuff the tomatoes with the mixture and garnish with garlic chives or other thin decorative herbs. This dish looks impressive and tastes amazing!
